description: Validates that agent output files conform to their schemas. Run after a guide generation.

tests.name: all candidates have safety_flag set
tests.assertion: all('safety_flag' in c for c in data['candidates'])

tests.name: retailers_searched is broader than retailers with results
all live-verified purchase options have price > 0
tests.assertion: all(opt['price'] > 0 for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['price_research']['purchase_options'] if opt['verified_live'])

tests.name: store_location must include store name, not just user city
tests.assertion: (not req.get('location')) or not any(opt.get('store_location') == '{city}, {state}'.format(city=req['location']['city'], state=req['location']['state']) for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['price_research']['purchase_options'] if opt.get('store_location') is not None)

tests.name: unverified purchase options must not claim in-stock
tests.assertion: all(opt['in_stock'] == False for c in data['candidates'] for opt in c['price_research']['purchase_options'] if not opt['verified_live'])

tests.name: all candidates have official_product_url field
tests.assertion: all('official_product_url' in c for c in data['candidates'])

tests.name: in_budget_only_at_sale_price=true candidates must have consider_waiting=true
tests.assertion: all(bool(c['price_research'].get('consider_waiting')) for c in data['candidates'] if c['price_research'].get('in_budget_only_at_sale_price') == True)

tests.name: every retailer in retailers_searched has evidence in research_log
tests.assertion: research_log is not None and all(any(any(w.lower() in text for w in r.replace('(','').replace(')','').split() if len(w) >= 4) for text in [s.get('query','').lower() + ' ' + (s.get('result_summary') or '').lower() for s in research_log.get('searches',[])] + [f.get('url','').lower() + ' ' + (f.get('retailer') or '').lower() + ' ' + (f.get('product') or '').lower() for f in research_log.get('playwright_fetches',[])]) for r in data.get('retailers_searched',[]))

tests.name: all in-stock candidates have at least one purchase option
tests.assertion: all(len(c['price_research']['purchase_options']) > 0 for c in data['candidates'] if c['price_research']['in_stock'])

tests.name: official_product_url null must have explanatory flag in spec_verification
tests.assertion: all(any('Official product page' in f for f in c.get('spec_verification', {}).get('flags', [])) for c in data['candidates'] if c.get('official_product_url') is None)

tests.name: screenshots recorded in research_log must exist on disk
tests.assertion: all(os.path.exists(os.path.join(run_dir, f['screenshot'])) for f in data.get('playwright_fetches', []) if f.get('screenshot'))

tests.name: safety_flag false must match clear recall status
tests.assertion: all(c['lifecycle_check']['recall_status'] == 'clear' for c in data['candidates'] if not c['safety_flag'])

tests.name: purchase_options must be sorted by price ascending
tests.assertion: all(all(opts[i]['price'] <= opts[i+1]['price'] for i in range(len(opts)-1)) for c in data['candidates'] for opts in [c['price_research']['purchase_options']] if len(opts) > 1)
